# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User File Uploader
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents, saving them to wp-content/uploads/user-files/.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

// Ensure WordPress is loaded
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit; // Exit if accessed directly
}

class User_File_Uploader {

    private $upload_dir;
    private $upload_url;
    private $allowed_mimes;

    public function __construct() {
        $upload_info = wp_upload_dir();
        $this->upload_dir = $upload_info['basedir'] . '/user-files';
        $this->upload_url = $upload_info['baseurl'] . '/user-files';

        // Define allowed mime types for various documents and images
        $this->allowed_mimes = apply_filters('user_file_uploader_allowed_mimes', array(
            'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
            'gif'          => 'image/gif',
            'png'          => 'image/png',
            'bmp'          => 'image/bmp',
            'tif|tiff'     => 'image/tiff',
            'webp'         => 'image/webp',
            'pdf'          => 'application/pdf',
            'doc'          => 'application/msword',
            'docx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'ppt'          => 'application/vnd.ms-powerpoint',
            'pptx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation',
            'xls'          => 'application/vnd.ms-excel',
            'xlsx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
            'txt|asc|c|cc|h|log' => 'text/plain',
            'rtf'          => 'application/rtf',
            'zip'          => 'application/zip',
            'csv'          => 'text/csv',
        ));

        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_scripts'));
        add_shortcode('user_file_uploader', array($this, 'render_uploader_shortcode'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_user_file_uploader_upload', array($this, 'handle_file_upload'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_user_file_uploader_upload', array($this, 'handle_file_upload')); // For non-logged-in users if needed
        add_action('init', array($this, 'create_upload_directory'));
    }

    /**
     * Create the custom upload directory if it doesn't exist.
     */
    public function create_upload_directory() {
        if (!is_dir($this->upload_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($this->upload_dir);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Enqueue necessary scripts and styles.
     */
    public function enqueue_scripts() {
        if (is_singular() && has_shortcode(get_post()->post_content, 'user_file_uploader')) {
            wp_enqueue_script('user-file-uploader-script', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'js/user-file-uploader.js', array('jquery'), null, true);
            wp_localize_script('user-file-uploader-script', 'userFileUploader', array(
                'ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
                'nonce'    => wp_create_nonce('user_file_uploader_nonce'),
                'upload_success_message' => __('File uploaded successfully!', 'user-file-uploader'),
                'upload_error_message' => __('Error uploading file.', 'user-file-uploader'),
                'no_file_selected_message' => __('Please select a file to upload.', 'user-file-uploader'),
                'invalid_file_type_message' => __('Invalid file type. Allowed types: %s', 'user-file-uploader'),
                'file_too_large_message' => __('File is too large. Max size: %s', 'user-file-uploader'),
            ));
            wp_enqueue_style('user-file-uploader-style', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'css/user-file-uploader.css');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Renders the file upload form shortcode.
     *
     * @param array $atts Shortcode attributes.
     * @return string HTML output for the form.
     */
    public function render_uploader_shortcode($atts) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>' . __('You must be logged in to upload files.', 'user-file-uploader') . '</p>';
        }

        $current_user = wp_get_current_user();
        $user_id = $current_user->ID;

        // Get user's previously uploaded files
        $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'uploaded_user_files', true);
        if (!is_array($user_files)) {
            $user_files = array();
        }

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div id="user-file-uploader-container">
            <h3><?php _e('Upload Your Files', 'user-file-uploader'); ?></h3>
            <p><?php _e('Please upload your profile picture and other required documents below.', 'user-file-uploader'); ?></p>

            <form id="user-file-upload-form" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                <input type="file" name="user_file" id="user_file_input" multiple="false" />
                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="user_file_uploader_upload" />
                <?php wp_nonce_field('user_file_uploader_nonce', 'user_file_uploader_nonce_field'); ?>
                <button type="submit" id="upload_file_button"><?php _e('Upload File', 'user-file-uploader'); ?></button>
            </form>
            <div id="upload-status" class="user-file-uploader-message"></div>

            <?php if (!empty($user_files)) : ?>
                <h4><?php _e('Your Uploaded Files:', 'user-file-uploader'); ?></h4>
                <ul id="user-uploaded-files-list">
                    <?php foreach ($user_files as $file_data) :
                        $file_url = $file_data['url'];
                        $file_name = basename($file_data['name']); // Use original name for display
                        $file_type = wp_check_filetype($file_data['path']);
                        $is_image = strpos($file_type['type'], 'image/') === 0;
                        ?>
                        <li>
                            <?php if ($is_image) : ?>
                                <img src="<?php echo esc_url($file_url); ?>" alt="<?php echo esc_attr($file_name); ?>" style="max-width: 100px; max-height: 100px; vertical-align: middle;" />
                            <?php else : ?>
                                <span class="file-icon dashicons dashicons-media-default"></span>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                            <a href="<?php echo esc_url($file_url); ?>" target="_blank"><?php echo esc_html($file_name); ?></a>
                            <small>(<?php echo esc_html(size_format(filesize($file_data['path']))); ?>)</small>
                        </li>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </ul>
            <?php else : ?>
                <p><?php _e('You have not uploaded any files yet.', 'user-file-uploader'); ?></p>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    /**
     * Handles the AJAX file upload.
     */
    public function handle_file_upload() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('You must be logged in to upload files.', 'user-file-uploader')));
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['user_file_uploader_nonce_field']) || !wp_verify_nonce($_POST['user_file_uploader_nonce_field'], 'user_file_uploader_nonce')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('Security check failed. Please refresh the page and try again.', 'user-file-uploader')));
        }

        if (empty($_FILES['user_file']['name'])) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('No file selected for upload.', 'user-file-uploader')));
        }

        $file_name = sanitize_file_name($_FILES['user_file']['name']);
        $file_tmp_name = $_FILES['user_file']['tmp_name'];
        $file_error = $_FILES['user_file']['error'];
        $file_size = $_FILES['user_file']['size'];

        if ($file_error !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => $this->get_upload_error_message($file_error)));
        }

        // Validate file type
        $file_info = wp_check_filetype($file_name, $this->allowed_mimes);

        if (empty($file_info['ext']) || empty($file_info['type'])) {
            $allowed_exts = implode(', ', array_keys($this->allowed_mimes));
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => sprintf(__('Invalid file type. Allowed types: %s', 'user-file-uploader'), $allowed_exts)));
        }

        // Validate file size (e.g., max 25MB)
        $max_file_size = apply_filters('user_file_uploader_max_file_size', 25 * 1024 * 1024); // 25 MB
        if ($file_size > $max_file_size) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => sprintf(__('File is too large. Max size: %s', 'user-file-uploader'), size_format($max_file_size))));
        }

        $current_user = wp_get_current_user();
        $user_id = $current_user->ID;

        // Create a user-specific subdirectory
        $user_upload_dir = $this->upload_dir . '/' . $user_id;
        $user_upload_url = $this->upload_url . '/' . $user_id;

        if (!is_dir($user_upload_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_upload_dir);
        }

        // Generate a unique file name to prevent overwrites and security issues
        $file_basename = wp_basename($file_name, '.' . $file_info['ext']);
        $new_file_name = sanitize_title($file_basename) . '-' . uniqid() . '.' . $file_info['ext'];
        $destination_path = $user_upload_dir . '/' . $new_file_name;
        $destination_url = $user_upload_url . '/' . $new_file_name;

        // Move the uploaded file
        if (move_uploaded_file($file_tmp_name, $destination_path)) {
            // Save file info to user meta
            $file_data = array(
                'name'      => $file_name, // Original file name
                'path'      => $destination_path,
                'url'       => $destination_url,
                'type'      => $file_info['type'],
                'uploaded'  => current_time('mysql'),
            );

            $uploaded_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'uploaded_user_files', true);
            if (!is_array($uploaded_files)) {
                $uploaded_files = array();
            }
            $uploaded_files[] = $file_data;
            update_user_meta($user_id, 'uploaded_user_files', $uploaded_files);

            wp_send_json_success(array(
                'message' => __('File uploaded successfully!', 'user-file-uploader'),
                'file_url' => $destination_url,
                'file_name' => $file_name,
                'is_image' => strpos($file_info['type'], 'image/') === 0,
                'file_size_formatted' => size_format($file_size)
            ));
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('Failed to move uploaded file.', 'user-file-uploader')));
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get a human-readable error message from UPLOAD_ERR_ codes.
     *
     * @param int $error_code The upload error code.
     * @return string The error message.
     */
    private function get_upload_error_message($error_code) {
        switch ($error_code) {
            case UPLOAD_ERR_INI_SIZE:
                return __('The uploaded file exceeds the upload_max_filesize directive in php.ini.', 'user-file-uploader');
            case UPLOAD_ERR_FORM_SIZE:
                return __('The uploaded file exceeds the MAX_FILE_SIZE directive that was specified in the HTML form.', 'user-file-uploader');
            case UPLOAD_ERR_PARTIAL:
                return __('The uploaded file was only partially uploaded.', 'user-file-uploader');
            case UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE:
                return __('No file was uploaded.', 'user-file-uploader');
            case UPLOAD_ERR_NO_TMP_DIR:
                return __('Missing a temporary folder.', 'user-file-uploader');
            case UPLOAD_ERR_CANT_WRITE:
                return __('Failed to write file to disk.', 'user-file-uploader');
            case UPLOAD_ERR_EXTENSION:
                return __('A PHP extension stopped the file upload.', 'user-file-uploader');
            default:
                return __('Unknown upload error.', 'user-file-uploader');
        }
    }

}

// Initialize the plugin
new User_File_Uploader();

// Create the js/ and css/ directories and files for the plugin if they don't exist
// This is typically done manually, but for a self-contained example, we can include it.
// In a real-world scenario, you'd distribute the plugin with these files already present.
register_activation_hook(__FILE__, 'user_file_uploader_activate');

function user_file_uploader_activate() {
    $plugin_dir = plugin_dir_path(__FILE__);

    // Create js directory and file
    $js_dir = $plugin_dir . 'js/';
    if (!is_dir($js_dir)) {
        wp_mkdir_p($js_dir);
    }
    $js_file = $js_dir . 'user-file-uploader.js';
    if (!file_exists($js_file)) {
        file_put_contents($js_file, <<<JS
jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
    $('#user-file-upload-form').on('submit', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();

        var formData = new FormData(this);
        var fileInput = $('#user_file_input')[0];
        if (fileInput.files.length === 0) {
            $('#upload-status').text(userFileUploader.no_file_selected_message).removeClass('success').addClass('error');
            return;
        }

        $('#upload_file_button').prop('disabled', true).text('Uploading...');
        $('#upload-status').text('').removeClass('success error');

        $.ajax({
            url: userFileUploader.ajax_url,
            type: 'POST',
            data: formData,
            processData: false,
            contentType: false,
            success: function(response) {
                if (response.success) {
                    $('#upload-status').text(userFileUploader.upload_success_message).removeClass('error').addClass('success');
                    // Optionally clear the file input
                    $('#user_file_input').val('');

                    // Add the new file to the list
                    var fileItem = '<li>';
                    if (response.data.is_image) {
                        fileItem += '<img src="' + response.data.file_url + '" alt="' + response.data.file_name + '" style="max-width: 100px; max-height: 100px; vertical-align: middle;" />';
                    } else {
                        fileItem += '<span class="file-icon dashicons dashicons-media-default"></span>';
                    }
                    fileItem += '<a href="' + response.data.file_url + '" target="_blank">' + response.data.file_name + '</a>';
                    fileItem += '<small> (' + response.data.file_size_formatted + ')</small>';
                    fileItem += '</li>';

                    if ($('#user-uploaded-files-list').length) {
                        $('#user-uploaded-files-list').append(fileItem);
                    } else {
                        // Create the list if it doesn't exist (first upload)
                        var newListHtml = '<h4>' + 'Your Uploaded Files:' + '</h4><ul id="user-uploaded-
